ingredients.item:
SALAD
5 tablespoons vegetable oil, divided
10½ ounces (300 g) store-bought or homemade seitan
ingredients.original:
SALAD
5 tablespoons vegetable oil, divided
10½ ounces (300 g) store-bought or homemade seitan

ingredients.item: 1¾ ounces (50 g) Vietnamese mint, stems removed and roughly chopped
ingredients.original: 1¾ ounces (50 g) Vietnamese mint, stems removed and roughly chopped

ingredients.item: 3 makrut lime leaves, cut into fine threads
ingredients.original: 3 makrut lime leaves, cut into fine threads

ingredients.item: 1. MAKE THE SALAD In a medium skillet, heat 2 tablespoons of vegetable oil over low heat. When hot, add seitan and cook until golden brown on all sides (3 to 5 minutes). Remove and place on a paper towel–lined plate to drain and let cool.
ingredients.original: 1. MAKE THE SALAD In a medium skillet, heat 2 tablespoons of vegetable oil over low heat. When hot, add seitan and cook until golden brown on all sides (3 to 5 minutes). Remove and place on a paper towel–lined plate to drain and let cool.

ingredients.item: 2. Tear seitan into thin strips along fiber grain, place in a medium bowl, and set aside.
ingredients.original: 2. Tear seitan into thin strips along fiber grain, place in a medium bowl, and set aside.

ingredients.item: 3. In a medium skillet, heat remaining 3 tablespoons of vegetable oil over medium heat. When hot, add leek and cook and stir until golden brown (1 to 2 minutes). Remove from heat and let cool.
ingredients.original: 3. In a medium skillet, heat remaining 3 tablespoons of vegetable oil over medium heat. When hot, add leek and cook and stir until golden brown (1 to 2 minutes). Remove from heat and let cool.

ingredients.item: 4. MAKE THE DRESSING In a small bowl, combine sugar, lime juice, soy sauce, salt, and stock powder (if using). Stir well until all solids are dissolved.
ingredients.original: 4. MAKE THE DRESSING In a small bowl, combine sugar, lime juice, soy sauce, salt, and stock powder (if using). Stir well until all solids are dissolved.

ingredients.item: 5. ASSEMBLE Pour half of the dressing into the bowl of shredded seitan and mix well so seitan will absorb it.
ingredients.original: 5. ASSEMBLE Pour half of the dressing into the bowl of shredded seitan and mix well so seitan will absorb it.

ingredients.item: 6. Add fried leek, pepper, Vietnamese mint, lime leaves, and the rest of the dressing. Mix well and serve immediately.
ingredients.original: 6. Add fried leek, pepper, Vietnamese mint, lime leaves, and the rest of the dressing. Mix well and serve immediately.
